new_terms.context: Nvidia's strategy for rack-scale integration where hardware and software are designed together to the limit.
The specific rack-scale system configuration for the Vera Rubin platform.
A specific memory module type (likely LPDDR-based) used in the Vera Rubin compute tray.
Bill of Materials, used extensively in the financial and component analysis of the system.

new_terms.suggested_translation: 纵向扩展 / 横向扩展
new_terms.context: Refers to the NVLink network (scale up) versus the backend Ethernet/InfiniBand network (scale out).
The rack-scale architecture name preceding or related to the Rubin generation.
A component in the power delivery system of the rack.
A heavy-duty conductor used for power distribution within the rack.
